title: OpenAM FreeMarker template injection via custom login URL template
description: RealmOAuth2ProviderSettings.getCustomLoginUrlTemplate() builds a FreeMarker Template from a configured loginUrlTemplate string using a default Configuration with no class resolver restriction. Combined with FreeMarker's ?new() built-in, an attacker who can influence the template content (e.g., through realm settings or chained OAuth2 flows) can execute arbitrary commands via expressions like ${"freemarker.template.utility.Execute"?new()("<cmd>")}. The fix narrows the resolver to TemplateClassResolver.SAFER_RESOLVER.
